description: Reserve a slot to play pickleball indoors at ATA through City of Eugene Recreation.

name: Bailey Park
description: Come play pickleball at Bailey Park in Junction City, OR! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
